meta.summary: SeqKit ultrafast toolkit for FASTA/Q sequence manipulation and lightweight BAM monitoring.
meta.description: SeqKit ultrafast toolkit for FASTA/Q sequence manipulation and lightweight BAM monitoring.

test: seqkit version | grep -Fx 'seqkit v2.13.0' >/dev/null && seqkit --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'SeqKit -- a cross-platform and ultrafast toolkit' >/dev/null && seqkit sample2 --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'sample sequences' >/dev/null && seqkit bam --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'BAM' >/dev/null && { ldd $(command -v seqkit) 2>&1 || true; } | grep -E '(not a dynamic executable|statically linked)' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-seqkit-basic && cd /tmp/taf-seqkit-basic && printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTNNNNACGT
>chr2
TTAGGGTTAGGGCCCTAA
' > ref.fa && printf '@r1
ACGTNN
+
FFFFFF
@r2
TTAGGGTTAGGG
+
FFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && seqkit stats -T ref.fa reads.fq > stats.tsv && grep -F 'ref.fa' stats.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'reads.fq' stats.tsv >/dev/null && seqkit fq2fa reads.fq > reads.fa && grep -F '>r1' reads.fa >/dev/null && seqkit seq -m 12 ref.fa > filtered.fa && grep -F '>chr2' filtered.fa >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-seqkit-search && cd /tmp/taf-seqkit-search && printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTNNNNACGT
>chr2
TTAGGGTTAGGGCCCTAA
' > ref.fa && printf 'chr2
' > ids.txt && seqkit grep -f ids.txt ref.fa > chr2.fa && grep -F '>chr2' chr2.fa >/dev/null && seqkit locate -p ACGT ref.fa > locate.tsv && grep -F 'chr1' locate.tsv >/dev/null && seqkit faidx ref.fa chr1:2-5 > slice.fa && grep -F 'CGTA' slice.fa >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-seqkit-convert && cd /tmp/taf-seqkit-convert && printf '>seq1
ATGAAATAG
>seq2
ACGTTT
' > seqs.fa && seqkit translate -w 0 seqs.fa > prot.fa && grep -F 'MK*' prot.fa >/dev/null && seqkit seq -r -p seqs.fa > rc.fa && grep -F 'AAACGT' rc.fa >/dev/null && seqkit fx2tab seqs.fa > seqs.tsv && seqkit tab2fx seqs.tsv > round.fa && grep -F '>seq1' round.fa >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-seqkit-compress && cd /tmp/taf-seqkit-compress && printf '>seq1
ACGTACGT
>seq2
TTAGGGTTAGGG
>seq3
CCCCAAAAGGGG
' > seqs.fa && seqkit sample2 -n 2 -s 7 seqs.fa > sample.fa && grep -F '>seq' sample.fa >/dev/null && seqkit seq -o seqs.fa.lz4 seqs.fa && test -s seqs.fa.lz4 && seqkit stats seqs.fa.lz4 > lz4.stats && grep -F 'seqs.fa.lz4' lz4.stats >/dev/null && seqkit sum seqs.fa > sum.txt && grep -F 'seqkit.v0.1_DLS_k0_' sum.txt >/dev/null

upstream.name: SeqKit
upstream.citation: Shen, Sipos and Zhao 2024; Shen et al. 2016
